source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing PR #896 or newer; the follow-on reuses the existing NoC primitive generator stack.

requested_items.objective: Measure proposal-linked 128/256-bit NoC router and FIFO lane primitives for the Llama7B endpoint path after flat 2048-bit router/FIFO boundary failures.
requested_items.notes: This is the segmented_or_narrower_router_ppa_required and segmented_or_narrower_fifo_ppa_required follow-on from the latest endpoint/router/SRAM composition result. Merged via PR #899 and merge 8074249a95092c10fc83920d43299ee9f48b8a01 at 2026-06-17T10:57:12.304716Z.
